import logging

logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)


def get_user_role(user_id: str) -> str:
    user = db.fetch_user(user_id)
    if user is None:
        raise ValueError(f"User {user_id} not found")
    return user["role"]


def calculate_discount(customer_id: str, order_total: float) -> float:
    tier = get_customer_tier(customer_id)
    if tier is None:
        raise ValueError(f"Customer {customer_id} has no tier assigned")
    if tier not in ("bronze", "silver", "gold", "platinum"):
        raise ValueError(f"Invalid customer tier: {tier}")
    return DISCOUNT_RATES[tier]


def get_config_value(key: str) -> str:
    try:
        value = config_store.get(key)
    except ConfigError as e:
        raise RuntimeError(f"Config lookup failed for '{key}'") from e
    if value is None:
        raise KeyError(f"Config key '{key}' not found")
    return value


def resolve_tenant(request_host: str) -> str:
    tenant = tenant_registry.lookup(request_host)
    if tenant is None:
        raise ValueError(f"No tenant registered for host: {request_host}")
    if not tenant.is_active:
        raise ValueError(f"Tenant {tenant.id} is inactive")
    return tenant.id
